sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15429" key="a(rpedona/ptai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁρπεδον-άπται</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶν</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n15429.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rope-fasteners,</tr_> applied to Egyptian geometers, [<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> </bibl>]<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:299" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">299</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
